content: Hey guys what I add to frth slot and covenant for my helot  pls

You intend to play her as the carry right?
Give her blade of titan + her signature/lily wheel
Yep I like this game and I literally build all the characters
Tho I used loop a year worth of loop master on thias wheel

Ok, use this setup:

Mouchette: BoT + celestial beast

Thais: Puppet(Gdoll wheel)+ Incal

Helot: light house + chain

Aigis: Thais wheel + her own wheel/silver heart

Covanent wise:
Mouchette: dreams

Thais: burial ground

Helot: burial ground

Aigis: life drain
i see what u did there
Because thais works better with aliemus(for exalt spam)
And you are making aigis the keyflare generator in this setup
So you put the keyflare wheels on the life drain user

If that's the case you can retain the current thais setup
This is my current set up

No real reason to use them

Not sure if it was like that before, but if the status is online, it sends a notification once someone reacts to a message <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>
Sr if my question sounds arrogant but idk where it is. Is it, perchance is the story mode?
About astral reign. Where is it?
Astral Reign is Arc 2 of the story and not shown until you finish the normal mode of Faded Legacy
It currently has 4 chapters with the next coming end of march
Any recommendations? Idk if I can pass the story mode with this team

Mouchette is your only carry right now so it's gotta be her. E3 is more than enough to pass all normal mode for sure. You can go different routes depending on which other awakeners you like of your current pool.
Safest imo would be chaos + caro so Aegis for vuln and her stun, Hameln for keyflare and insights to look for more Mouch cards during burst, Ramona for keyflare and finding additional Mouch cards during burst would be what I would try with your pool.
Consider picking up a copy of Helot, and then run her together with Mouchette, Ramona and Aigis
Yeah regular Helot would be great too if <@913769321203912704> has some standard selectors. I think you get some when you start out?
I'd recommend pulling on the Caro Standard Banner over using their Selectors this early on
Since they'll be receiving lots of Pure Cores
Not sure if I would pull caro more just to find Helot. Rather go straight to wheel jail imo. Mouch will carry normal mode regardless if you have helot or not.
Good luck making it through the day
Haven't heard ts in a hot min
Last I heard of it was when I was still in Elementary School myself, so hearing it again after so long threw me in for a loop
